name: fix-resolver-tier-label-503-retry-toast
title: Fix studio resolver priority, tier-label nomenclature, transient 503 retry, and update-bell toast wording
summary: Four user-visible bugs found while inspecting greet-anton in vskill studio. The skill-name resolver mistakenly maps a vskill-source skill to a sibling standalone repo (offers a destructive update from the wrong upstream); the version-timeline shows raw CERTIFIED instead of the trust-tier label; check-updates surfaces transient platform 503s; the update-bell toast tells the user to switch agents even when the skill is also installed locally.
